allow:
Bash(PGPASSWORD=rb_password psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 55434 -U rb_user -d resume_blueprint_db -c "
SELECT version, description, success, installed_on
FROM flyway_schema_history
ORDER BY installed_rank;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=rb_password psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 55434 -U rb_user -d resume_blueprint_db -c "
SELECT schemaname, tablename FROM pg_tables 
WHERE schemaname IN \('public','rb'\) ORDER BY schemaname, tablename;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=rb_password psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 55434 -U rb_user -d resume_blueprint_db \\
  -c "SELECT version, description, success FROM flyway_schema_history ORDER BY installed_rank;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=rb_password psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 55434 -U rb_user -d resume_blueprint_db \\
  -c "DELETE FROM rb_job_description;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=rb_password psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 55434 -U rb_user -d resume_blueprint_db \\
  -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM rb_document; SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM rb_job_description;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=rb_password psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 55434 -U rb_user -d resume_blueprint_db \\
  -c "SELECT 'rb_document' AS tbl, COUNT\(*\) FROM rb_document UNION ALL SELECT 'rb_job_description', COUNT\(*\) FROM rb_job_description;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=rb_password psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 55434 -U rb_user -d resume_blueprint_db \\
  -c "SELECT jd_id, level, summary FROM rb.rb_job_description;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=rb_password psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 55434 -U rb_user -d resume_blueprint_db \\
  -c "SELECT jd_id, level, summary FROM rb_job_description;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=rb_password psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 55434 -U rb_user -d resume_blueprint_db \\
  -c "SELECT schema_name FROM information_schema.schemata WHERE schema_name NOT IN \('pg_catalog', 'information_schema', 'pg_toast'\);" \\
  -c "SELECT schemaname, tablename FROM pg_tables WHERE tablename LIKE 'rb_%' ORDER BY schemaname, tablename;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=rb_password psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 55434 -U rb_user -d resume_blueprint_db \\
  -c "\\d rb.rb_document" \\
  -c "\\d public.rb_document")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=rb_password psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 55434 -U rb_user -d resume_blueprint_db \\
  -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM rb.rb_document;" \\
  -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM rb.rb_baseline_term;" \\
  -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM rb.rb_match_run;" \\
  -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM rb.rb_success_profile;")
